## Important

**Do NOT use this template for security vulnerabilities!**

For vulnerabilities, please follow our [Security Policy](../../SECURITY.md) and report privately.

This template is for:
- Security documentation improvements
- Questions about security design decisions
- Non-exploitable security hardening suggestions
